attributes.name: [Azure Activity Logs OTel] Administrative operation success rate 99.5% rolling 30 days
attributes.description: This SLO tracks the success rate of Azure Resource Manager administrative operations via Activity Logs, ensuring that 99.5% of completed operations (excluding in-progress Start/Started) succeed over a rolling 30-day period. Failed operations indicate infrastructure automation issues, permissions problems, or resource provider outages.

metrics.name: A
metrics.filter: not (azure.result.type: "Start" or azure.result.type: "Started") and not (azure.result.type: "Failure" or azure.result.type: "Failed")
